root_text.an5.95:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu nacirasseva akuppaṁ paṭivijjhati.
root_text.an5.95:1.3: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu atthapaṭisambhidāpatto hoti, dhammapaṭisambhidāpatto hoti, niruttipaṭisambhidāpatto hoti, paṭibhānapaṭisambhidāpatto hoti, yathāvimuttaṁ cittaṁ paccavekkhati.
root_text.an5.95:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu nacirasseva akuppaṁ paṭivijjhatī”ti.

translation_text.an5.95:1.1: “Mendicants, a mendicant who has five things will soon penetrate the unshakable.
translation_text.an5.95:1.3: It’s when a mendicant has attained the textual analysis of meaning, text, definition, and eloquence, and they review the extent of their mind’s freedom.
translation_text.an5.95:1.4: A mendicant who has these five things will soon penetrate the unshakable.”
